RestoringMovement.SupportingIndependence.

Care begins with understanding your condition, goals, and daily environment. We provide clinician-led, individualised support for people living with injury, illness, or physical impairment.

Restoring Movement. Supporting Independence.

At Cajee Botes Orthotist Prosthetist, care begins with understanding your unique needs. Every device is prescribed based on comprehensive clinical assessment, not available stock.

At Cajee Botes Orthotist Prosthetist, care begins with understanding your condition, your goals, and your daily environment. Orthotic and prosthetic devices are not prescribed based on available stock, but on a comprehensive clinical assessment to ensure that each intervention supports safe mobility, comfort, and long-term function. During the initial phase of practice, assessments and fittings are provided through a mobile service in both home and hospital settings. This allows rehabilitation to begin early for patients who may be unable to travel following surgery, injury, or illness.

Every treatment plan begins with a thorough assessment of your unique condition, lifestyle, and rehabilitation goals.

Care Where You Need It

We offer a mobile home and hospital service model, bringing professional orthotic and prosthetic care directly to you. Whether you're recovering at home, in hospital, or unable to travel, we conduct comprehensive assessments in your own environment to ensure the most appropriate and functional outcomes.

  • Home Visits Available
  • Hospital Service
  • Comprehensive Assessment
  • Personalized Care
  • Professional Service

Our Services

Comprehensive orthotic and prosthetic care tailored to your needs

01

Custom Orthotics

Individually designed orthotic devices crafted to support your unique biomechanical needs and rehabilitation goals.

  • Custom-fit upper and lower limb orthoses
  • Spinal and neurological support devices
  • Paediatric orthotic solutions
  • Precision-crafted insoles and supports
02

Off-the-Shelf Orthotics

High-quality prefabricated orthotic devices for immediate support during recovery, injury management, or post-operative care.

  • Joint braces and post-operative supports
  • Injury management and soft support
  • Sports bracing and protection
  • Ready-to-use mobility solutions
03

Mobility Aids

Professional mobility equipment to support safe movement and independence in daily living and rehabilitation.

  • Crutches, walking sticks, and frames
  • Wheelchairs and transfer aids
  • Toilet seat raisers and bathroom support
  • Expert guidance on proper use
04

Medical Compression

Specialist compression garments for lymphoedema management, oedema control, and post-surgical recovery.

  • Medical-grade compression garments
  • Lymphoedema and oedema management
  • Scar therapy and burn management
  • Flight socks and sports compression
05

Breast & Silicone Prosthetics

Compassionate, dignified care for breast, facial, and digit prosthetic needs with a focus on comfort and natural appearance.

  • Breast prostheses and nipple solutions
  • Finger and toe prosthetics
  • Facial and cosmetic prostheses
  • Private, respectful fittings
06

Upper & Lower Limb Prosthetics

Advanced prosthetic solutions designed to restore function, mobility, and confidence for individuals with limb loss.

  • Upper and lower limb prostheses
  • Paediatric prosthetic care
  • Functional and cosmetic designs
  • Ongoing support and adjustments

Why Choose Us

Professional, compassionate care focused on long-term independence

Individualised, Assessment-Led Care

Every treatment plan begins with understanding your unique needs, goals, and environment.

Clinician-Led Expertise

Qualified orthotist and prosthetist providing evidence-based, patient-centred support.

Functional & Thoughtful Design

Devices designed for real-life use, comfort, and long-term independence.

Home & Hospital Accessibility

Mobile service bringing professional care to your home or hospital bedside.

Interactive Body Map

Where does it hurt?

From neck and back pain to knees, ankles and feet — pinpoint your pain on our interactive body map and discover the orthotic or prosthetic solution that can help.

Success Stories

Patient stories are on their way

In the meantime, our blog answers the questions patients ask us most.

Care Where You Are

Cajee Botes Orthotist & Prosthetist is an HPCSA-registered practice based in Centurion, providing orthotic and prosthetic care across Gauteng — including Pretoria, Midrand, Johannesburg and surrounding areas. Because every assessment can happen at home or at the hospital bedside, patients who struggle to travel after surgery, amputation or injury can begin rehabilitation without delay. From custom orthotics and prosthetic limbs to compression garments, mobility aids and breast prostheses, every device is prescribed after an individual clinical assessment and fitted with ongoing review — so your support keeps pace as your needs change.

Advice & Answers

Clinician-written answers to the questions patients ask us most about orthotic and prosthetic care — from costs and medical aid funding to living with a prosthetic leg.

Do I Need a Referral to See an Orthotist or Prosthetist in South Africa?

You can book directly with an HPCSA-registered orthotist or prosthetist in South Africa without a referral — it's medical aid funding, not the consultation, that usually needs a doctor's prescription.

14 July 2026

Does my child need orthotics for flat feet?

Most children with flat feet need nothing more than time and sensible shoes. Here's how to tell the difference between a normal stage of development and the red flags that warrant an assessment.

7 July 2026

Can Orthotics Fix Flat Feet Permanently?

Orthotics can ease the pain and strain of flat feet, but they don't reshape an adult arch permanently. Here's what the evidence actually says — and when flat feet need proper treatment.

24 June 2026
Read all articles
